Featured Projects & Case Studies

Explore my work in climate resilience, hydrologic modeling, and sustainable development

🌊

Hydrologic Modeling for Climate Resilience

Developed SWAT models for watershed management in Nepal, assessing climate change impacts on water resources and agricultural productivity.

SWAT Climate Change Water Resources
🗺️

GIS-Based Multi-Hazard Assessment

Created comprehensive hazard maps for flood-prone regions, integrating remote sensing data with field surveys for disaster preparedness planning.

GIS Remote Sensing Disaster Management
📊

Climate Policy Analysis

Conducted policy research for government agencies, evaluating climate adaptation strategies and developing evidence-based recommendations.

Policy Research Climate Adaptation Government
🎓

Education & Capacity Building

Designed and delivered training programs for NGOs and universities, focusing on GIS, Python programming, and research methodology.

Training Education Python
🌍

Sustainable Development Consulting

Provided strategic consulting for international organizations on sustainable water management and environmental policy implementation.

Sustainability Consulting International
📈

Data Analytics for Environmental Monitoring

Built automated monitoring systems using Python and R for real-time environmental data analysis and reporting.

Data Analytics Python Monitoring

Case Studies

Flood Risk Assessment in Himalayan Watersheds

Conducted comprehensive flood risk assessment for the Koshi River basin, integrating hydrologic modeling with socio-economic analysis to inform disaster management strategies.

  • Used HEC-HMS for flood modeling
  • Integrated climate change scenarios
  • Developed risk maps for policy makers

Climate Adaptation Strategy for Coastal Communities

Developed adaptation strategies for coastal communities in Bangladesh, combining climate modeling with community-based planning approaches.

  • Multi-stakeholder engagement
  • Integrated assessment framework
  • Capacity building workshops
